channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Big cardboard box dumped, 23rd March
item.description:
Large folded box left behind sign at the top of the alley linking Parish Lane with Linden Grove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated bollard knocked, wooden post down and an iron bollard also, 23rd March
item.description:
All 3 have been destroyed due to speeding cars and heavy goods vehicles, coaches, skip Lorrie’s, even double decker buses, these vehicles CANNOT manoeuvre around the roundabout. The roundabout has been destroyed. Speed humps on the approach to the roundabout fir speeding and width restrictions for large vehicles should be erected.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Houndsden Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on southwestern side of Lesnes Abbey bridge, 23rd March
item.description:
There's a bit of graffiti on the south western wall towards the end of the Abbey bridge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin Overflowing on Pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Public litter bin is very full and overflowing onto the pavement. Rubbish is being spread by footfall and traffic. The bin hasn't been emptied for many days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping 12th time this year, 23rd March
item.description:
MORE fly tipping !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: URGENT: Relocation Request for E-Bike/Scooter Parking Bay, 23rd March
item.description:
I am writing to formally request the immediate relocation of the designated e-bike and scooter parking on the corner of Hopton street. and 144 Southwark street. The current placement of this bay is causing significant daily disruption for the following reasons: Obstruction of Access: The bikes are consistently left directly in front of our shutters. We require clear access to these shutters every day for for deliveries and collections. Public Safety & Accessibility: Due to the bay's positioning, bikes are frequently overflowing onto the pavement. This creates a trip hazard and forces pedestrians. Operational Burden: Every morning, our team is forced to manually move and report multiple bikes just to begin our workday. This is an unreasonable expectation for local business owners. While we support green transport initiatives, a parking bay should never compromise the accessibility of a permanent building or the safety of a public walkway. Requested Action: I request that this parking zone be moved to a more suitable location that does not sit flush against a private entrance or narrow pavement. I have attached Photos of the daily obstruction for your review. I look forward to your prompt response regarding the timeline for this relocation. Sincerely,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144, Southwark Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car that has been here for over a montb, 23rd March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned for over a month. The license plate is missing at the front and the back plate has been inserted. Please come and remove it!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Shorne Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stairwell of Mandalay House needs a good clean, 23rd March
item.description:
There’s been some kind of spillage
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bins, 23rd March
item.description:
As usual after the weekend all litter bins next to the bus stops in Southend Road near to the junction of Copers Cope and The Avenue are full and overflowing causing litter to scatter along the pavements for 15/20 yards - this is a continuous problem and is not helped by one of the litter bins which was attached to the lamp post next to the bus stop having been taken away so now there are only two litter bins which are totally inadequate to deal with the masses of the litter that the nice public deposit there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 2 Chatsworth Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Huge mattress left there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load
